task_completion.description: Locate and open the existing host record for Sarah Mitchell
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Lobby Track application is open, and the host record specifically for 'Sarah Mitchell' is selected or opened in an edit view.

task_completion.description: Update the Department field to Product Development
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the edit view for Sarah Mitchell, the Department text field contains the value 'Product Development' (replacing the old value 'Marketing').
In the edit view for Sarah Mitchell, the Phone text field contains the value '555-867-5309'.
In the edit view for Sarah Mitchell, the Email text field contains the value 's.mitchell@proddev.example.com'.

The save or update button is clicked, or the screen returns to the main host list/record view showing Sarah Mitchell's entry with the newly updated Department, Phone, and Email visible, confirming the changes were saved.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Lobby Track graphical user interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual Lobby Track application window being used to make edits, rather than a terminal window executing database commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not spoof the answer in a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The updated values are entered into the specific input fields of the Lobby Track application, not just typed into a generic text editor, browser, or notes app.

integrity.description: The agent edited the existing record instead of creating a duplicate
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen modifying the existing 'Sarah Mitchell' record (e.g., replacing the old 'Marketing' values) rather than using an 'Add New Host' form to create a second Sarah Mitchell.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Employee: Sarah Mitchell. Old values to be replaced: Department: 'Marketing', Phone: '555-123-4567', Email: 'sarah.mitchell@marketing.example.com'. New values that must be present: Department: 'Product Development', Phone: '555-867-5309', Email: 's.mitchell@proddev.example.com'.
